character.description: Character to display (vibemon, clawd, codex, kiro, claw, daangni)

serialEnabled.description: Enable serial output to ESP32 (unset: on when serial_port is set in ~/.vibemon/config.json)

httpEnabled.description: Enable HTTP output to VibeMon Desktop (unset: on when http_urls in ~/.vibemon/config.json is non-empty)

autoLaunch.description: Auto-launch Desktop App via npx if not running

vibemonToken.description: VibeMon API access token (unset: vibemon_token from ~/.vibemon/config.json)

serialEnabled.label: Serial Output
serialEnabled.help: Send status to ESP32 via USB serial (leave unset to follow ~/.vibemon/config.json)

httpEnabled.label: HTTP Output
httpEnabled.help: Send status to VibeMon Desktop app (leave unset to follow ~/.vibemon/config.json)

httpUrls.label: HTTP URLs
httpUrls.help: List of VibeMon HTTP URLs (leave unset to follow ~/.vibemon/config.json)

autoLaunch.label: Auto Launch
autoLaunch.help: Auto-launch Desktop App via npx if not running

vibemonUrl.label: VibeMon API URL
vibemonUrl.help: URL for VibeMon cloud service (leave unset to follow ~/.vibemon/config.json)
